authorization_mode.description: Defines the access control mode for the Redis cluster, specifying whether users need authentication to access the cluster. Valid values are 'AUTH' or 'UNAUTHENTICATED'.

automated_backup_config.description: Configuration for automated backups, including schedule, retention period, and related settings.

cross_cluster_replication_config.description: Configuration for cross-region replication, specifying the source region and cluster ID for data replication setup.
cross_cluster_replication_config.type: list(object({cluster_role: optional(string),membership: optional(list(object({primary_cluster:list(object({cluster:string,uid:string})),secondary_clusters:list(object({cluster:string,uid:string}))}))),update_time: optional(string),primary_cluster: list(object({cluster: optional(string),uid: optional(string)})),secondary_clusters: list(object({cluster: optional(string),uid: optional(string)}))}))

deletion_protection_enabled.description: Enables or disables protection against accidental deletion of the Redis cluster. Set to true to prevent deletion.

kms_key.description: Specifies the Cloud KMS key used to encrypt data at rest, must be in the same region as the Redis cluster.

maintenance_policy.description: Defines the maintenance policy for the Redis cluster, specifying maintenance window preferences and any required configurations.
maintenance_policy.type: list(object({create_time: optional(string),update_time: optional(string),weekly_maintenance_window: list(object({day: string,duration: optional(string),start_time: list(object({hours: optional(number),minutes: optional(number),nanos: optional(number),seconds: optional(number)}))}))}))

name.description: Specifies the name of the Redis cluster; must be unique within the project and comply with naming conventions.

node_type.description: Specifies the type of Redis node to use, determining the compute and memory capacity; must match available types in the selected region.

persistence_config.description: Defines the persistence settings for the Redis cluster, including options for periodic snapshots and data durability.
persistence_config.type: list(object({mode: optional(string),aof_config: list(object({append_fsync: optional(string)})),rdb_config: list(object({rdb_snapshot_period: optional(string),rdb_snapshot_start_time: optional(string)}))}))

psc_configs.description: Specifies the Private Service Connect configurations for the Redis cluster, enabling secure private communication with the service.

redis_configs.description: Defines Redis configuration settings, such as memory policies or timeout values, to customize the behavior of the Redis cluster.

replica_count.description: Number of replica nodes in the Redis cluster; must be a non-negative integer.

shard_count.description: Specifies the number of shards in the Redis cluster. Must be a positive integer.

timeouts.description: Specifies timeout durations for create, update, and delete operations on the Redis cluster.

transit_encryption_mode.description: Specifies the encryption mode for data in transit between Redis clients and the cluster, with options such as 'SERVER_AUTHENTICATION' or 'DISABLED'.

zone_distribution_config.description: Defines the configuration for distributing nodes across zones, specifying the number of nodes per zone and ensuring high availability.
